summary: Verified the Jeff-corpus library ingestion parent after stale validator repair. The local Jeff intel state now proves 177/177 repos verified and indexed, 177 unique Qdrant collection references, 10 learning artifacts, P0/P1 derived beads across all statuses, canonical path entries, and a focused doctor signal reporting 177/177.

acceptance_gates.gate: AG1 repos.jsonl shows indexed_at for all 177 repos
acceptance_gates.evidence: tests/jeff-corpus-library-ingestion.sh: AG1 verified repo state covers 177 repos
tests/jeff-corpus-library-ingestion.sh: AG2 qdrant collection refs cover 177 unique repos; mcp socraticode codebase_list_projects shows /Users/josh/Developer/jeff-corpus entries
tests/jeff-corpus-library-ingestion.sh: AG3 persistent progress supports resume-after-interrupt
tests/jeff-corpus-library-ingestion.sh: ten per-query learning artifacts exist and carry What We Found / Gap In Flywheel / Recommended Bead/Memory Action sections

acceptance_gates.gate: AG6 top learnings filed as P0/P1 beads
acceptance_gates.evidence: Validator repaired to use br list --all because filed derived beads may now be closed. Test now passes with at least five P0/P1 jeff-corpus-derived beads across all statuses.
.flywheel/scripts/jeff-corpus-doctor.sh --json reports jeff_corpus_indexed_count=177 and jeff_corpus_index_target=177; validated by tests/jeff-corpus-library-ingestion.sh
tests/jeff-corpus-library-ingestion.sh: AG8 jeff-intel state and learnings canonical paths exist
tests/jeff-corpus-library-ingestion.sh: fixture artifacts present plus shape fixtures for both br array and object-with-issues output

validator_repairs.change: AG6 now uses br list --all so closed derived beads still count as filed proof.
AG7 now validates the focused Jeff corpus doctor directly instead of invoking the full flywheel-loop doctor tail, which can hang behind unrelated canonical-sync substrate work.
AG2 now asserts 177 unique qdrant_collection refs from repos.jsonl.

residuals: Full flywheel-loop doctor remains a broader substrate surface; this closeout only proves the Jeff-corpus doctor signal and library-ingestion acceptance gates.
operator_value: Turns Jeffrey Emanuel corpus ingestion into a reusable learning substrate with durable learning artifacts, derived work routing, and focused doctor proof instead of one-off research memory.
